description_long: This large bungalow features a symmetrical, stately facade with a prominent central entrance framed by columns and a grand archway. The structure is primarily constructed from red brick with white accents, and it has a complex, multi-level gable roof made of tan tiles. Numerous large, grid-patterned windows line all sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The upper levels are adorned with lush greenery, including trees and vines, and there is a rooftop terrace with a blue swimming pool. The landscaping includes manicured bushes and a wide staircase leading to the main entrance. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, creating a luxurious and inviting residential building.
description: A grand, red-brick bungalow with a multi-gabled tan roof, large grid windows, rooftop greenery, and a terrace with a pool. The entrance is stately with columns and a wide staircase.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with columns, a grand archway, symmetrical windows, and rooftop greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rooftop trees, vines cascading down the walls, and the pool terrace at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide staircase, central gable, and extensive window arrangement with lush landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool terrace, rooftop greenery, and the multi-level roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
